summary: Audience recording with a bit of hiss but clear enough; standout Cassidy in the first set and a solid second set make this a worthwhile download.
review: The audience tape carries some noticeable hiss, yet it is still one of the clearer recordings in the collection. Fans praise the first‑set highlight “Cassidy” and find the second set surprisingly good despite being described as a bit standard. Overall the performance and the listening experience are judged worth the download.

ai_rating.rationale: Review gives 4 stars, noting good musical moments and an acceptable audience recording despite hiss.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Hiss is present but the tape is still among the clearer audience recordings; overall listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set highlighted by a strong Cassidy, second set described as solid though somewhat standard.
